name: Air Duct Calculator
seo_description: Calculate diametro_circular_mm, lado_rectangular_mm with our free air duct calculator. Just enter caudal_m3h, velocidad_ms and get results instantly.
example_label: Calculate air duct cross-section for 0.5 m3/s flow at 5 m/s velocity.

range_hints.caudal_m3h: Airflow to transport. Residential: 150-500 m³/h, Office: 500-2000 m³/h, Commercial: 2000-10000 m³/h
range_hints.velocidad_ms: Recommended velocity: main ducts 5-8 m/s, branches 3-5 m/s, grilles 1-2.5 m/s

result_context: To {caudal_m3h} m³/h a {velocidad_ms} m/s se needs conducto of {diametro_mm}mm of diameter ({area_cm2} cm² of cross-section).
steps: Convert flow rate a m³/s: 500 m³/h ÷ 3600 = 0.139 m³/s
Diámetro comercial: 200mm or 250mm according to disponibilidad
mistakes: Use speed muy baja (conductos muy grandes, costo greater)
No Consider pérdidas per codos and derivaciones
description: Air duct sizing based on flow rate and velocity.
